data.name: Strip 4: Classmate Study
data.detailed_description:
Go Hardcore


Play the Next Chapter


關於此遊戲

A girl from school has invited you to study for exams.
She is bored and asking you to play.

Classic tabletop game in an intimate atmosphere.
Connect four (aka Four in a row, Gravitrips) combined with strip game.
Every time you win, she will take off one piece of clothes.

All characters are over the age of 18.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DX10/DX11/DX12 Capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.12
  • 顯示卡: Discrete GPU
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:

  • 顯示卡: DX10/DX11/DX12 Capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
